originalTitle: Modern Talking - Cheri Cheri Lady (Goldene Europa 1985, 28.11.1985)
content: Modern Talking performing „Cheri Cheri Lady“ at Goldene Europa in 1985. Title: Golden Europe 1985 Artist: Modern Talking Editorial: Hans-Bernhard Theopold Director: Harald Schäfer Host/Presenter: Manfred Sexauer Production: SR, 1985 Licensed through: SWR Media Services GmbH You can listen to all songs of Modern Talking here: https://ModernTalking.lnk.to/ProfilesAY Subscribe to the channel and activate notifications: https://www.youtube.com/@moderntalkingoffiziellYT ► https://www.facebook.com/ModernTalkingOfficial ► https://www.instagram.com/moderntalking.official/ ► https://www.tiktok.com/@moderntalking.official ______________________________________________ Lyrics: Oh, I cannot explain, every time, it's the same Oh, I feel that it's real, take my heart I've been lonely too long, oh, I can't be so strong Take the chance for romance, take my heart I need you so There's no time I'll ever go Cheri, cheri lady Goin' through a motion Love is where you find it Listen to your heart Cheri, cheri lady Living in devotion It's always like the first time Let me take a part Cheri, cheri lady Like there's no tomorrow Take my heart, don't lose it Listen to your heart Cheri, cheri lady To know you is to love you If you call me baby I'll be always yours I get up, I get down, all my world turns around Who is right? Who was wrong? I don't know I've got pain in my heart, got a love in my soul Easy come, but I think easy go I need you so All the times I move so slow Cheri, cheri lady Goin' through a motion Love is where you find it Listen to your heart Cheri, cheri lady Living in devotion It's always like the first time Let me take a part Cheri, cheri lady Like there's no tomorrow Take my heart, don't lose it Listen to your heart Cheri, cheri lady To know you is to love you If you call me baby I'll be always yours Cheri, cheri lady Like there's no tomorrow Take my heart, don't lose it Listen to your heart Cheri, cheri lady To know you is to love you If you call me "baby" I'll be yours Cheri, cheri lady Like there's no tomorrow Take my heart, don't lose it Listen to your heart Cheri, cheri lady To know you is to love you If you call me "baby" I'll be yours #ModernTalking #CheriCheriLady
chineseContent: Modern Talking 于 1985 年在 Goldene Europa 表演“Cheri Cheri Lady”。标题：Golden Europe 1985 艺术家：Modern Talking 编辑：Hans-Bernhard Theopold 导演：Harald Schäfer 主持人/主持人：Manfred Sexauer 制作：SR，1985 许可通过：SWR Media Services GmbH 您可以在这里收听 Modern Talking 的所有歌曲：https://ModernTalking.lnk.to/ProfilesAY订阅频道并激活通知：https://www.youtube.com/@moderntalkingoffiziellYT ► https://www.facebook.com/ModernTalkingOfficial ► https://www.instagram.com/moderntalking.official/ ► https://www.tiktok.com/@moderntalking.official ________________________________________ 歌词：哦，我无法解释，每次都一样哦，我觉得这是真的，拿走我的心，我已经孤独太久了，哦，我不能那么坚强，抓住浪漫的机会，拿走我的心，我需要你，所以我没有时间去谢里，切里女士，通过动作爱就在你找到它的地方，听从你的心，切里，切里女士，生活在奉献中，总是像第一次让我参与，切里，切里女士，就像没有明天，带上我的心，不要失去听听你的心 切里，切里女士 了解你就是爱你 如果你叫我宝贝 我将永远属于你 我起床，我下来，我的世界都在转动 谁是对的？谁错了？我不知道我心里有痛苦，我的灵魂里有爱，来得容易，但我想走得容易，我需要你所以每次我移动得如此缓慢切里，切里女士通过一个动作爱就是你找到它的地方听你的心切里，切里女士生活在奉献中总是像第一次让我参与切里，切里女士就像没有明天一样接受我的心，不要失去它听你的心切里， cheri lady 了解你就是爱你 如果你叫我 b
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
